purpose: Claude sidecar queue — synthesis, writing, and design tasks. Claude sessions ARE the pipeline agents for synthesis work. Read this file at every session start after CLAUDE.md and ARCHITECTURE.md.
synthesisPrinciple: Claude sessions do the judgment work that code does badly. When new context arrives (emails, decks, meeting notes), a Claude session reads it, updates pillar_synthesis.json and erp_pillar_baselines.json, and logs what changed. The UI displays those files. No rigid pipeline needed.

items.title: Refresh P2P pillar synthesis when new context arrives
items.why: P2P is in active fact-finding. Several open items (US LLC flow, Trustpair integration feasibility, RCM row extraction) are blocking the must-have control/workflow list that feeds ERP blueprint.
triggerWhen: New email from Kimberly Gordon or Matt Epley
items.promptHint: Read the P2P entry in pillar_synthesis.json and erp_pillar_baselines.json. Read the new context. Move confirmed items from currentStateUnknown to currentStateKnown. Update nextMoves and waitingOn. Update synthesizedAt. Add a changeLog entry. Do not rewrite fields that didn't change.

items.title: Refresh Reporting/Data pillar synthesis when new context arrives
items.why: Reporting is blocked on Frederick's dimension response, Hema's process docs, and Robin Lapous (KPMG) consolidation flow. COA design decision is the highest-stakes unresolved item.
triggerWhen: Frederick Golly response on FP&A dimensions received
items.promptHint: Read the reporting-data entry in pillar_synthesis.json. Read the new context. Update currentStateKnown, currentStateUnknown, keyDecisionsPending, nextMoves. Add a changeLog entry.

items.title: Refresh Controls/Audit pillar synthesis when new context arrives
items.why: Controls is blocked on ITGC RCM, Hema SOX findings, Jade IT gaps, and Adrian's 3-slide pack. The 9 ERP-signal controls need named owners before April mobilization.
items.promptHint: Read the controls-audit entry in pillar_synthesis.json. Read the new context. Update currentStateKnown, currentStateUnknown. Map any new deficiencies into ERP-addressable / non-ERP / management-decision buckets. Update nextMoves. Add a changeLog entry. Also flag whether the Audit Committee deck open data gaps should be marked closed.

items.title: Stakeholder Brief wording/style pass (fact-based operator language)
items.why: Person pages are improving structurally but still sound machine-like and repetitive to Mike.
items.promptHint: Rewrite top-of-page stakeholder brief copy style guidelines and example paragraphs for Mike, Trinidad, Hema using factual operator brief language (no ranking/fluff).

items.title: Today page post-meeting execution mode readability critique
items.why: Today is more useful now but still needs better visual clarity and lower cognitive load.
items.promptHint: Critique the top 1-2 screens for post-meeting mode and propose a tighter visual hierarchy without adding new workflow mechanics.

items.title: Program page visual hierarchy critique (status emphasis and pillar readability)
items.why: Program is strategically important, but status pills and dense blocks make it hard for Mike to quickly see what changed (for example, received evidence from Trinidad).
items.promptHint: Critique Program page visual hierarchy and status styling so received/pending/blocked signals are obvious at a glance without adding new workflow mechanics.

items.title: Cross-page readability pattern proposals (default-view budget + card reduction)
items.why: Mike consistently flags stacked-card layouts and text-heavy scanning across pages.
targets: Company Intel: legacy sections still present in source
Presentations: legacy sections still present in source
Program: advanced-only legacy sections retained in source
items.promptHint: Propose a reusable visual pattern system (not implementation code) for low-noise default views and advanced detail collapses.

items.title: Post-selection communication templates (Camille/Hema/NetSuite path)
items.why: NetSuite was selected; next phase needs clear communication and timing language.
items.promptHint: Draft concise, factual post-selection comms templates aligned to early April mobilization target and explicit ownership boundaries.
